# Robots.txt for ekalliptus.com
# Generated by @nuxtjs/robots module configuration
# This static file serves as a fallback; the module generates robots.txt dynamically

# Default rules for all bots
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_nuxt/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /private/
Disallow: /*.json$
Disallow: /*.md$
Disallow: /order-success

# Googlebot
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_nuxt/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /private/

# Bingbot
User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_nuxt/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /private/

# Yandex
User-agent: Yandex
Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_nuxt/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /private/

# Baidu
User-agent: Baiduspider
Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_nuxt/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /private/

# Block aggressive SEO bots
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /

User-agent: DotBot
Disallow: /

# Sitemap location (canonical domain)
